positive: A minimalist, high-contrast vector illustration of a stylized forest scene. The composition is centered and symmetrical, featuring delicate, interlocking silhouettes of pine trees, abstract mountain peaks, and stylized fauna (like leaping deer and soaring owls). The color palette is restricted to deep indigo, burnt orange, and cream white, mimicking a modern, retro-futuristic limited print palette. The style should emulate screen-print aesthetics with clear, solid color blocking and crisp edges. Highly decorative, ideal for textile printing on apparel. Concept: 'Whispering Woods'.
negative: blurry, artifacts, text, watermark, low resolution, excessive detail, poor anatomy, logo, brand, signature, anime, photorealistic, 3d render
